name: VISA INC.
summary: Visa Inc. is a global digital payments company that provides transaction processing services—primarily authorization, clearing and settlement—through its proprietary VisaNet network across more than 200 countries and territories. Visa offers credit, debit, prepaid and cash access products through nearly 14,500 financial institution clients, serving nearly 5 billion payment credentials at over 175 million merchant locations. It also provides value-added services including Issuing Solutions, Acceptance Solutions, Risk and Security Solutions, and Advisory Services.
